title: Root Inc (ROOT) Q3 2023 Earnings: New Writings Double, Loss Ratio Improves
text: Root Inc reported strong Q3 2023 results with significant growth metrics. New writings surged 141% quarter-over-quarter and 376% year-over-year. Gross premiums written increased 49% to $224 million. Net loss improved 31% to $46 million. Loss ratio improved 11 points year-over-year, reaching 68%. Adjusted EBITDA improved 58% to a negative $19 million. Combined ratio improved 12 points to 119%. Root, founded in 2015 and based in Columbus, Ohio, leverages data science for personalized insurance offerings. The firm has collected over 21 billion miles of driving data and maintains roughly 12 million app downloads. Management expects continued policy growth through year-end, stable loss ratios reducing reinsurance expenses, and materially lower cash consumption compared to 2022. GuruFocus flagged 2 warning signs associated with ROOT stock.
